creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
The /usr/ports/mail/dkim-milter port installs a start script in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/milter-dkim. Left untouched, DKIM-Milter produces an error:

:milterdkim_flags="": not found

Fix: 

Introduce a space after the colon:

: milterdkim_flags=${milterdkim_flags=""}

instead of

:milterdkim_flags=${milterdkim_flags=""}

Note: even with the error, the flags (if any) appear to be honored.
How-To-Repeat: /usr/local/etc/rc.d/milter-dkim start
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/milter-dkim restart
